prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SGSURSB-10PC-11-MTL-3 Product Type: LAB_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: 10pc Sterile Surgical Grade Replacement Scalpel Blades Universal Fit - Size 11 Description: For precision cutting, nothing beats a scalpel. These carbon steel scalpel blades are will ensure you make a precise cut when you can't afford to make mistakes.

These size 11 replacement blades are made of durable solid carbon steel to ensure the most accurate of cuts when every detail counts. Cuts great though plastic sheets, fabric, cardboard, and gloss paper with easy blade installation design. Never run out of sharp blades for any of you projects.

Take your craft to the next level with these precision replacement scalpel blades. Search Terms: crafting hobby knife replacement art bladee tools leather working garage accessories surgical replacement scalpel blades Features: - Great For all Precision Cutting Applications - Material: Carbon Steel | Blade Size: #11 - Includes 10 Individually Sealed, Sterile Blades - Excellent for X-acto Knife Tool === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Hobby 10-pc Size 11 Sterile Surgical Scalpel Blades
